title: Grouped-Query Attention
description: An attention variant that reduces KV cache memory by sharing key-value heads across query heads.

whatItIs.title: What It Is
whatItIs.body: Grouped-query attention is an attention variant derived from multi-head attention.

hero.alt: Diagram comparing multi-head attention and grouped-query attention head grouping.
hero.caption: Query heads share fewer key-value heads in grouped-query attention.

computeFlow.alt: Compute flow diagram for grouped-query attention.
computeFlow.caption: GQA compute flow from queries through shared KV heads.

comparisonTable.caption: How GQA compares with nearby attention variants.

trainingChart.caption: Training cost trend for grouped-query attention.
